hero_subtitle: MASc Student • Department of Civil and Resource Engineering • Dalhousie University
bio_html: I am a MASc student in the Department of Civil and Resource Engineering at Dalhousie University, Canada. My research focuses on traffic-related runoff pollution, emerging contaminants, and sustainable water quality management. I am particularly interested in understanding the environmental fate, transport, and remediation of microplastics, PFAS, 6PPD-quinone, and other persistent pollutants through environmental monitoring, modelling, and advanced treatment technologies.
